_comment: Copy to ~/.pipeline/config.json and edit. All keys are optional.

notifications._slack_channel_help: Set to your Slack channel name (without '#') to enable notifications via the claude-slack plugin. Leave null to disable.

review._deep_flag_help: Append a flag to the review skill invocation. Leave empty for plain /code-review.

_worktree_paths_help: Templates for orchestrator-created (per pipeline row) and handler-managed (qa-test, code-review) worktree paths. Placeholders: {root}, {root_parent}, {project}, {branch}, {branch_type}, {branch_local}, {kind}, {feature}. Defaults — orchestrator: '{root_parent}/{project}-wt/{branch_type}-{branch_local}'; handler: '{root_parent}/.worktrees/{kind}-{feature}'. Use absolute paths to ignore {root_parent}.
_plansDir_help: Where plan files live, relative to the project root. Default 'plans' resolves to <project-root>/plans/. Supports {project} placeholder — use '../CLAUDE/repos/{project}/plans' if your plans live in a separate knowledge-base repo alongside the project (e.g. the directory layout ../CLAUDE/repos/my-project/plans).
_session_templates_dir_help: Override directory for session templates (dev-session.md, review-session.md, test-session.md, research-session.md, governor-session.md). Per-file fallback to plugin bundled templates. Leave null to use bundled defaults.

merge._help: Merge layer settings. doc_impact_enabled: gates step 4 (LLM-driven doc updates against operator docs). commit_extras: extra paths (relative to the plans-repo git toplevel) to git-add into commit #2 when plans live outside the project repo (e.g. ['CLAUDE.md', 'pipeline-reference.md'] for the operator's setup).
